title: More Beautiful Slabs
description: This mod adds around 240 new Slabs and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Slabs. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new slabs you must first create the Slab Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any slab from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Slab Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Slabs emit light like their respective blocks.

Some Slabs

Example of Slab Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 2 slabs)

Magma Block Slab

Obsidian Cry Slab

Diamond Block Ore Slab

Gilded Blackstone Slab

***GLASS SLABS TOO***

Special Slabs

For some slabs you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Slab, Fire Soul Slab, Lava Slab(2 version), Nether Portal Slab and Strange Slab(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
